 in form group mae e see what i am typing  in the inputs

_**Agent (copilot/auto)**_

## 👀 Great news: your inputs already update live

Excellent: your form is already wired correctly. When you type in the `Administrator Email` / `Secure Password` fields, React updates state (`loginEmail`, `loginPassword`) and the values are bound to the inputs.

---

## 🔐 Password visibility built in

In `src/App.jsx`, this is the password field logic:

- state: `showLoginPassword` (`false`)
- input type: `type={showLoginPassword ? "text" : "password"}`
- toggle button shows eye icon

So clicking the eye toggles masking/unmasking.

---

## ✅ If you want password text always visible

Change initial state to `true`:

- `const [showLoginPassword, setShowLoginPassword] = useState(true);`

or force text type:

- `type="text"` (not recommended for security, but works for visibility)

---

## 🛠️ Full form fields where typed value is visible

`App.jsx` has:

- Email field:
  - `value={loginEmail}`
  - `onChange={... setLoginEmail ...}`
- Password field:
  - `value={loginPassword}`
  - `onChange={... setLoginPassword ...}`

These are correct for immediate typing feedback.

---

## 💡 Quick fix for “I can’t see what I type”

- Click the password-eye button (if hidden, becomes plain text)
- If you want always visible, set `showLoginPassword` default to `true` in `useState`

If you want, I can give the exact 2-line snippet to paste in `src/App.jsx`.
